nasb.text: How much better it is to get wisdom than gold! And to get understanding is to be chosen above silver.

esv.text: How much better to get wisdom than gold! To get understanding is to be chosen rather than silver.

cnv.text: 得智慧勝過得金子， 選擇哲理，勝過選擇銀子。

ccb.text: 得智慧胜过得黄金， 获悟性胜过获白银。

csbs.text: 获得智慧多么好，胜过得金子； 获得悟性，胜过得精选的银子。
